button-news: Stay up to date with the latest news
site-header-start-three: Connect with people from all over the world and practice languages without fear of making mistakes. A welcoming space for all proficiency levels.
features-title-detail: A platform designed to make language learning more accessible, fun, and efficient for everyone.
features-button-one-details: Practice without fear of judgment in a welcoming and inclusive space
features-button-two-details: From beginner to advanced, there's space for everyone to grow their skills
features-button-three-details: Fluid and natural conversations with people from around the world
features-button-four-details: Learn languages in the most natural way possible: by speaking
features-button-five-details: Be part of a global community of language learners
features-button-six-details: Connect instantly with other users to practice
roadmap-page-title-description: Discover our development plan and what's coming next
roadmap-item-one-title: Beta Launch for Android and Web
roadmap-item-one-description: First version with basic chat and level-based matching features
roadmap-item-four-description: Release of additional features and expansion to new markets
cta-page-description: Join thousands of people already practicing English safely and effectively with Safe 4 Talk.
unsubscribe-desc: If you want to unsubscribe from our application, please enter your email address below:
data-deletion-intro: Safe4Talk values your privacy. In compliance with Facebook Platform policies, Google API Services User Data Policy, GDPR, and LGPD, we provide the following instructions on how to request the deletion of your data.
data-deletion-form-intro: The fastest way to delete your data is using the automated form below. Enter the email linked to your account:
data-deletion-alt-intro: Alternatively, you can request data deletion via email. If you signed up or logged in using Facebook Login or Google Login:
data-deletion-request-p1: If you signed up or logged in using Facebook Login or Google Login and wish to remove your data associated with Safe4Talk, please follow these steps:
data-deletion-request-li1: Send an email to our Data Protection Team at privacy@safe4talk.com.
data-deletion-request-li2: Use the subject line: Data Deletion Request.
data-deletion-request-li3: In the email body, please include your full name and specify that your account is linked via Facebook or Google Login.
data-deletion-facebook-p2: Alternatively, you may remove the app permissions directly through Facebook:
data-deletion-facebook-li1: Go to your Facebook Account Settings & Privacy > Settings.
data-deletion-facebook-li3: Find Safe4Talk in the list of active apps.
data-deletion-note: Note: Once we receive your request via email or a revocation notification from Facebook or Google, we will initiate the data deletion process.
data-deletion-types-p1: Upon your request, the following data will be permanently removed/anonymized:
data-deletion-types-li1: Profile information (Name, Email Address, Profile Picture).
data-deletion-types-li2: Social Provider User IDs (Facebook/Google) and authentication tokens.
data-deletion-types-li3: Any application-specific preferences stored purely for your user session.
data-deletion-timeframe-p1: Your data will be completely deleted from our systems within 30 days of the request verification.
